_publications._publicationTitle: Use of machine learning to predict cognitive performance based on brain metabolism in Neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Group differences with medium effects were observed in measures of dexterity (9HPT dominant hand)
details: Showed medium effect size differences between NF1 and controls for dominant hand dexterity (0.89 ± 0.30 vs 0.79 ± 0.23, p=0.327, d=-0.38) but did not reach statistical significance
